name: Rigatoni a La Vodka
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly sauté the bacon until crispy. Remove from heat, leaving 2 tablespoons of drippings in the pan.
2. Add butter to the remaining drippings and simmer on low heat for 3 minutes.
3. Stir in vodka, tomato sauce, heavy cream, salt, and pepper. Keep warm without cooking on high heat; this will prevent the cream from separating.
4. Cook macaroni according to package instructions. Drain well before mixing with the sauce.
5. Combine cooked rigatoni with the sauce, top with grated cheese, and serve.
